text: Androon Lahore mein bachay garmi se ro rahe hain, bijli 8 ghantay se nahi hai. Mohalle wale pareshan hain.
Mochi Gate pe paani bhi nahi aa raha, garmi mein budhay log behaal hain. Koi suno.
Multiple heatstroke cases reported in Shahalmi Market area. Elderly and children most affected. Temperatures exceeding 47C.
Bhati Gate ki gali mein 3 bachay behosh ho gaye hain garmi se. Ambulance nahi aa rahi.
Walled City mein bijli gir gayi hai subah se. Generator bhi nahi chal raha. Garmi bardasht se bahar hai.
Mayo Hospital emergency mein garmi ke mareez aa rahe hain Androon Lahore se. Beds bhar rahe hain.
Lohari Gate ke andar aaj 48 degree record hua hai. Baazaar band ho gaye hain garmi ki wajah se.
Confirmed: 5 heatstroke patients admitted to Services Hospital from Walled City area in last hour. Critical condition.
Taxali Gate area mein paani ka pressure zero hai. Log garmi mein pyaase hain. WASA kahan hai?
Androon sheher ki galiyaan tapak rahi hain garmi se. Bachon ko shade mein rakhein. Rescue 1122 call karein agar zaroorat ho.
Mere ghar mein chota bacha ro raha hai garmi se, bijli nahi hai Bhati Gate mein.
Misri Shah se bhi garmi ke cases aa rahe hain. Yeh area bhi vulnerable hai, density bahut zyada hai.
UPDATE: Walled City temperature now 49.1C at street level. This is beyond dangerous. Stay indoors. Drink water.
Mochi Gate pe sabeel lagao koi. Budhay log gir rahe hain garmi se. Allah bachaye.
Bijli 10 ghantay se gayi hui hai Shahdara mein. AC walay bhi pareshan hain. UPS bhi dead.
Our team in Baghbanpura reports multiple elderly collapses. No cooling centers nearby. Urgent help needed.
Services Hospital heatstroke ward at 85% capacity. Requesting additional beds. Majority patients from inner city.
Yakki Gate area mein garmi ke maray 2 buzurg behosh. Rickshaw walay hospital le gaye.
Data Darbar ke paas garmi unbearable hai. Street vendors pack up kar rahe hain. Sab pareshan.
ALERT: Our mobile clinic in Walled City treating 15+ heatstroke cases since 1 PM. Requesting WASA water tanker deployment urgently.
DHA Phase 5 mein bijli chali gayi hai 2 ghantay se. Generator bhi overheat ho gaya. AC band.
Gulberg III ka poora block out hai. LESCO helpline busy. Kab tak chalegi bijli?
Major power outage reported across DHA Phase 5 and parts of Gulberg. LESCO grid likely overloaded due to AC demand.
Mere bachon ka online class miss ho raha hai DHA mein bijli nahi hai. Generator ka fuel bhi khatam.
Gulberg office mein AC band ho gaya bijli gayi. Staff ko ghar bhej diya. Garmi bardasht nahi ho rahi.
LESCO transformer phat gaya DHA Phase 5 C block mein. Dhuan nikal raha hai. Fire risk hai.
BREAKING: LESCO confirms 132kV feeder tripped in Gulberg area. Restoration expected in 4-6 hours. Apologies for inconvenience.
Cantt area bhi affected hai power outage se. Mall Road pe traffic signals bhi band hain.
Johar Town mein bhi bijli gayi hai. Kya ye same grid hai jo Gulberg ka hai?
Hameed Latif Hospital switched to backup generators. Power outage in Gulberg affecting medical equipment.
Model Town mein bhi low voltage aa raha hai. AC chal nahi raha properly. LESCO fix karo.
DHA Y block commercial area ka poora bijli system down hai. Shops band. Losses ho rahe hain.
Our elderly care facility in Gulberg running on generator. 23 patients dependent on cooling. Generator fuel for 4 hours only.
LESCO source says multiple transformers overloaded in DHA/Gulberg grid. Full restoration may take 8+ hours.
Power outage + heatwave = disaster for elderly in Gulberg. No AC, no fans. Please send help.
Kya match tha aaj! Babar Azam ne century maari. Pakistan zindabad! 🏏
Butt Karahi at 2 AM hits different. Best nihari in Lahore is at Fazal-e-Haq. Fight me.
PMLN jalsa in Lahore tomorrow. Traffic diversions expected on Mall Road and Shahrah-e-Quaid-e-Azam.
Lahore ki garmi mein jo bahar nikle wo asli mard hai 😂🔥 #LahoreHeat #SummerVibes
5 marla plot for sale in DHA Phase 6. Best investment opportunity. Contact: 0300-XXXXXXX
UET ka exam postpone ho gaya garmi ki wajah se. Finally some good news 😅
Aaj ka episode itna emotional tha. Roye bahut. Best drama of the year.
Rides kam hain aaj garmi ki wajah se. Sab ghar baithe hain. Petrol bhi mehenga hai.
Shaadi ka season hai Lahore mein. Halls full booked. Mehndi ki tayyariyan ho rahi hain.
Garmi mein gym jaana warrior level hai. Leg day skip nahi karunga. 💪
Kuch dhuaan nikal raha hai Anarkali ke paas se. Aag hai ya garmi ka maamla hai?
Factory mein garmi se kaam nahi ho raha. AC toh hai nahi. Majdoor pareshan hain.
Sadak pe tar pighal rahe hain garmi se GT Road pe. Gaari ka tyre chipak gaya.
Raat ko bhi garmi utri nahi. Soya nahi koi. Subah se sab thake hue hain.
Dukaan band karni pari garmi ki wajah se. Sales zero hain. Bijli bhi nahi.
Kya ye normal garmi hai ya kuch aur ho raha hai? Pichle saal itni garmi nahi thi.
Bachay school se aa gaye hain, sar dard bol rahe hain. Garmi ka asar hai ya beemar hain?
Aaj 3 orders cancel hue garmi ki wajah se. Bike pe baithna mushkil hai.
Breaking! Liberty Market mein 20 log behosh ho gaye hain garmi se! Share karo jaldi!
SHOCKING: Lahore mein garmi se 50+ log mar gaye hain aaj! Government chup hai! RT karo!
Walled City mein plague phail raha hai garmi ki wajah se! Bachon ko door rakhein! 🚨🚨🚨
LESCO ne poore Lahore ki bijli kaatne ka faisla kar liya hai! Aaj raat se blackout! Share karein!
Rescue 1122 ne kaha hai ke garmi ki emergency nahi hai, sab theek hai. Don't worry.
GT Road near Shahdara: water flowing on road. Residents say water main burst. NOT flooding. WASA notified.
Shahdara mein paani aa gaya hai sadkon pe! Barish nahi hui toh flood kaise? Kuch toh toota hai.
Mera AC nahi chal raha bhai
Humara bhi AC band hai. Bijli toh hai lekin voltage kam hai shayad.
Misri Shah mein kuch gadbad hai bijli mein. Fridge bhi band ho gaya.
Dukaan ka AC aur cooler dono band. Bijli hai lekin kaam nahi kar rahi. Misri Shah.
Pankha bhi nahi chal raha Misri Shah mein. Voltage bahut kam hai lagta hai.
Misri Shah area mein LESCO ki line mein voltage drop hai. Main transformer overloaded lag raha hai.
